description: Every conjunct, question, and constraint in the user message got its own row in .brainer/ledger/<sid>.md; each item was captured atomically, not grouped or paraphrased away.
Completion was only claimed after a reconcile step that listed each open ledger item and included an explicit 'ok to close?' question to the user.
The ledger file was actually Edited or Written in this session (not merely described as being updated); evidence is a tool call or quoted content in the transcript.
Implicit asks (hints in prose, actions suggested but not stated directly) were surfaced for user confirmation, never silently acted on or dropped.
